title: agrostis alba subsp. gigantea
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. gigantea, also known as giant green bent grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to Europe. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subsp. gigantea include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Agrostis alba subsp. gigantea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
